suppress.notes: file name: spring-ws-security-3.1.1.jar reason: not used
file name: spring-ws-security-3.1.1.jar reason: not used
file name: spring-ws-security-3.1.1.jar reason: no fix, not exploitable (escalation of privilege and there is only one endpoint)
file name: spring-ws-security-3.1.1.jar reason: no fix, not exploitable (escalation of privilege and there is only one endpoint)
file name: jackson-databind-2.21.4.jar reason: no fix available yet (2.21.5 not released). Upgrade when available.
file name: kotlin-stdlib-2.4.0.jar reason: unsafe deserialization in build cache metadata. Fix is Kotlin 2.4.20 (only beta available). Upgrade when stable release is out.
